text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's been raining like mad since this<n>morning. Amid
the occasional<n>thunderclaps, T.M. Opera O begins
to<n>shout.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, you sky! Mark my words! I will<n>not yield to
your storms!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Give it a rest, Oppy.There's nothing you can do whenit's raining this hard.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Ponytails
text_block_list.text:
We have to let the fans know it's<n>canceled now.
What a shame—we'd<n>been preparing for so long.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not lose heart!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There's still time! Please... put your<n>faith in me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... You see...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: We were supposed to put on a play<n>outside today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It was going to be part of our<n>volunteer work. But
in this weather,<n>well...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! The heavens are merely testing<n>my resolve!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Pat, pat, pat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uwhaa?! O-Opera O?! Where are you—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, sky! You heavens! You<n>bolts of lightning!
Try as you may, you<n>cannot drown out my voice!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I chase after Opera O, who seems to<n>be heading
for the roof. I race up the<n>stairs, desperate to keep
up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whoosh! Crack! Boom!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will inspire the people! Be there rain<n>in my face,
wind in my hair, or thunder<n>in my ears!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My will shall never waver! For it is I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Centurial Overlord... The T.M.Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I watch her howling at the sky while<n>she gets
battered by the elements.
choice_data_list: Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Hear me rain! Stop this instant!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I watch her howling at the sky while<n>she gets
battered by the elements.
choice_data_list: Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Hear me rain! Stop this instant!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I lead her back inside to put on some<n>dry clothes
right away.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Alas, I could not convey tothe heavens the entirety of myconviction.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but... you would have caught a cold<n>if you
stayed any longer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O, look! Out the window!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Could it be?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The rain... It has ceased!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: At this rate, it should be sunny by the<n>afternoon!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! You heard me in the<n>end, o
heavens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though you might act again in<n>defiance, know that
I remain standing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Rebel all you wish, but my will shall<n>never falter!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sun comes out in full force that<n>afternoon, not
a cloud left to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O shines even brighter<n>than usual
among the glistening water<n>droplets that dress the
surrounding<n>trees, and the crowd gives a standing
ovation as the curtain falls.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After we spend some time yelling at<n>the sky, I lead
her inside to put some<n>dry clothes on right away.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Going out in the middle of a<n>downpour... You're
going to get<n>yourself sick.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Anything less would not have<n>gotten my
feelings across to that<n>mischievous sky.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: See for yourself!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No way... The rain stopped!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Behold the power of<n>my will!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even the sun cannot bear to go<n>without my
radiance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Praise me if you must! For I am—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, no! I-I'll go get some tea!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sun comes out in full force that<n>afternoon, not
a cloud left to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O appears fine. In fact, she<n>shines
brighter than ever, and her<n>performance goes off
without a hitch.
